items.displayName: The user wants to start this process manually to read an Excel file and place orders on a website.
Read the first 3 columns from an Excel file named "orders.xlsx" into the dt_ExtractDataTable variable.
Iterate through each row of the extracted data table to place an order for each one.
Click the OK button on the pop-up, Select the head option, Select the body option, Enter the number of legs, Click the Preview button, Click the ORDER button, Click the ORDER ANOTHER ROBOT button
Click on the OK button on the pop-up
Click on the Work Items button
Click on the Work Items button
Type the number of legs from the current data row into the appropriate input box
Click on the Work Items button
Click on the Work Items button
Click on the Work Items button to navigate to the next screen
